content: The iterative memory pruning and reinforcement process of a 2025 meta-learning memory consolidation agent can be repurposed to shape the intrinsic curiosity of a general AI agent: the agent only consolidates long-term memory of exploratory outcomes that resolve high uncertainty, which automatically prunes uninformative random exploration and amplifies curiosity that consistently leads to novel generalizable skills. This creates a self-tuning curiosity mechanism that does not require separate reward modeling or hand-crafted exploration schedules.
